title: Four-Nine
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image= |name=Four-Nine
CC-8/349 |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth= |death=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] ([[Cloning/Legends|clone]])[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} '''Four-Nine''', designated '''CC-8/349''', was a [[Clone Captain/Legends|clone trooper captain]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He commanded a [[Platoon/Legends|platoon]] of [[Clone heavy assault trooper|heavy assault trooper]]s. After landing on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], he and his troops were instructed by [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] to counter any militia attacks on [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]]. Later on, he was ordered to prevent any harm to the [[Balawai]] officer [[Lorz Geptun]] as he attempted to transmit the codes deactivating the droid starfighter's attack commands. Four-Nine originally objected to Mace's order to use proton grenades on the control bunker door, as he believed other clone troopers, civilians and their Korun allies to be alive in there. Mace informed him that they had all been killed, except the [[Akk Guard]]s, [[Kar Vastor]], and [[Depa Billaba/Legends|Depa Billaba]]. When Four-Nine offered to lead his troopers into the bunker first, Mace rejected the offer, saying that the clones would be no match for the Korunnai Force-users. Windu proved to be correct as numerous clones were cut down by the Akk Guards. Four-Nine was one of the 24 clone casualties during the fight for the control bunker. ==Appearances== *[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']] {{Ab|Shatterpoint (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=CC-8/349 }} [[Category:Clone trooper captains]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]]
